title: K-th Symbol in Grammar
hints: Observe that each row is exactly twice as long as the previous one. How does the parent of position K in row N relate to K?
The symbol at K in row N depends on the symbol at a specific position in row N-1. Determine that parent index using integer division.
The value flips if the parent index was odd, and stays the same if it was even. This suggests counting the number of 1s in the binary representation of K-1.
